mission.title: thanos: Store: fix prometheus store label values for matches on external labels
mission.description:
External Labels should also be tested for matches against the matchers.

Should fix: #6803

* [x] I added CHANGELOG entry for this change.
* [x] Change is not relevant to the end user.

## Changes

Fixed the order of operations in LabelValues checks in Prometheus Store API

## Verification

Added an acceptance test to also verify it for other store implementations.

resolution.summary:
Cut patch release `v0.32.5` with fixes #6802, #6816 and #6817. 
This also ports certain commits, which allow us to build with latest go version and latest `golang.org/x/net` release, in-order to address [CVE](https://groups.google.com/g/golang-announce/c/iNNxDTCj
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
